provenance.coda_implementation: CodaFullBlock source and SHA recorded per variant

generation.prompt: Two anthropomorphic cats in comfy boxing gear and bright gloves fight intensely on a spotlighted stage.
generation.negative_prompt: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
generation.cfg_execution: sequential cond then uncond, batch=1 each

timing_protocol.label: DiT-only, T5/VAE excluded
timing_protocol.clock: CUDA events on current CUDA stream
timing_protocol.scope: complete WanModel.forward; CFG combine, scheduler, T5, VAE, model movement and export excluded
timing_protocol.aggregation: median of per-generation summed DiT event time
timing_protocol.memory_scope: denoising-phase peak allocation; includes live scheduler/CFG temporaries, while the latency metric remains DiT-only

similarity.domain: all aligned VAE-decoded RGB uint8 frames, clipped to [-1,1] and mapped to [0,255], before MP4 encoding
similarity.ssim_method: skimage Gaussian-weighted SSIM, sigma=1.5, channel_axis RGB, data_range=255, population covariance

quality_gate.interpretation: operational decoded-video regression gate; passing indicates high structural similarity, not pixel identity or losslessness
